body.title: CLOSED: Igor completes 10 tickets autonomously — CC-guided first pass
body.result: All 10 T-cc-walk-{01..10} children completed by Igor. Walk 1–10 verified closed.
body.description:
Strategic: get Igor completing his own queue tickets without Akien intervention. First batch = 10 S-size tickets hand-picked for low HIGH-inertia risk. CC monitors each run, intercepts bad proposals, resets pre-flight stalls, and verifies commits. Success = all 10 closed with Igor as author. Children: T-cc-walk-{1..10}.

**Affected files:** queue.json (ticket state), various Igor subsystem files per child tickets.
**Design rules:** none apply — this is coordination overhead, not code.
**Scope boundary:** IN — 10 specific tickets listed in children. OUT — redesigning pe_chain, Igor's full queue autonomy beyond these 10.
**Test plan:** all 10 child walk tickets reach done; each target ticket closed by Igor.
